name: Deluxe Salmon Spread
recipeInstructions:
1. Put mayonnaise, lemon juice, and diced green pepper into a blender.
2. Blend on low until smooth.
3. Add the rest of the ingredients (tarragon vinegar, diced pimento, and chopped dried dill) to the blended mixture.
4. Mix well in a bowl.
5. Chill the spread.
6. Serve with brown bread.
